Class Plant

java.lang.Object
Plant
Direct Known Subclasses:
FloweringPlant, Tree
public class Plant extends Object
Stores general information about a plant sold by the nursery.

  • Constructor Details

    • Plant

      public Plant(String commonName, String genusSpecies, Plant.PlantGroup plantGroup, LocalDate dateIntroduced, HashMap<Integer,Zone> zones)
      Creates a Plant and assigns the next sequential id.
      Parameters:
      commonName - common plant name
      genusSpecies - scientific name
      plantGroup - plant group
      dateIntroduced - date introduced to nursery
      zones - zones where plant thrives

    • growsInZone

      public boolean growsInZone(int zoneNumber)
      Checks whether a plant grows in a given zone.
      Parameters:
      zoneNumber - zone number
      Returns:
      true if it grows in that zone, false otherwise
